## Plugin reference

- Description: Table indexes section in the table detail view.
- Contributes:
  - `TableDetail.Section` "indexes" → `IndexesSection`
- Server:
  - Uses: `database.db`
  - `GET /api/catalog/tables/:tableName/indexes`
